description:
Bootstrap epic produced by /spec-led-bootstrap (full-adopt + migrate path).

Target phase: phase2
Subjects in scope: 9 (status: draft -> active, then realized_by.api_boundary)
Worktree: /Users/mz/dev/mz/mutagen_ex-bootstrap
Branch: spec-led/bootstrap
Dep: {:spec_led_ex, github: "iautom8things/specled_ex", branch: "main", only: [:dev, :test], runtime: false}
Phase0 scaffolding committed: feb5675

Context: the .spec/ corpus was hand-authored as a tooling-optional convention
(documented in the original .spec/AGENTS.md). This epic reverses that stance
(see .spec/decisions/adopt_specled_tooling.md) and migrates the corpus to the
SpecLedEx schema, then binds each subject to code via realized_by.api_boundary.

Migration surface (mix spec.validate on the original corpus): errors=67 warnings=273
  - 9x parse_error    : spec-scenarios needs given/when/then arrays
  - 58x verification_*: spec-verification needs command:/target:
  - 267x scenario_*   : resolve once scenario blocks reshaped
  - 6x requirement_without_verification
The 18 decision files already match SpecLedEx schema and are NOT migrated.

Opt-outs: implementation/expanded_behavior/use/typespecs tiers OFF (api_boundary only);
coverage triangulation (spec.cover.test) OFF (phase4 follow-on); test-tag scanner (phase3) OFF.
Reference: docs/adoption.md in the spec_led_ex repo.
title: Adopt SpecLedEx to phase2 (migrate bespoke .spec corpus)
